vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to high avionics heat generation.
risk.mit: Implement active cooling systems or increase thermal conductivity of materials.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure under extreme maneuvering loads.
risk.mit: Conduct stress analysis and reinforce critical areas.

risk.desc: Risk of water ingress through camera window.
risk.mit: Use waterproof seals and ensure proper drainage.

risk.desc: Potential for electrical interference between avionics and harness.
risk.mit: Use shielded cables and ensure proper grounding.

risk.desc: Risk of improper alignment during assembly.
risk.mit: Develop detailed assembly instructions and use alignment tools.

verify.value: All required features and geometry operations are present.
verify.rule: Each risk item needs: id, desc, mit

verify.value: Estimated mass: 1200g
verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
verify.rule: P0 lists features but geometry_ops are generic boxes at the origin

verify.value: All interfaces are named and reciprocal connection_type, DOF, clearance_mm, required_feature are provided.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to large temperature range from -20 to +50C.
risk.mit: Implement thermal expansion joints and use materials with low thermal expansion coefficients.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient clearance for moving parts in the landing gear mount.
risk.mit: Ensure all critical moving parts have a clearance of at least 0.3mm.

risk.desc: Risk of nacelle attachment failure due to improper preload or locking mechanism.
risk.mit: Verify preload and locking mechanism during assembly and include a torque test in the verification plan.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure due to high loads from rotor thrust and tilt servo.
risk.mit: Conduct load testing and structural analysis to ensure the wing spar can handle the design loads.

risk.desc: Risk of assembly sequence errors due to complex interfaces.
risk.mit: Develop a detailed assembly sequence and train assembly personnel on proper sequence and torque settings.

generated_parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
generated_parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

verify.value: All required fields are present and correctly formatted.
verify.rule: Check if all required fields in the blueprint are present and correctly formatted.

verify.value: The mass estimation is accurate and within expected range.
verify.rule: The mass_est_g field should contain a numeric value representing the estimated mass in grams.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets are present and correctly referenced in the geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Each internal_feature_target must be present in the part_tree and referenced by at least 4 geometry_ops.

verify.value: Adjacent interfaces are correctly named and match neighboring subsystem labels.
verify.rule: Each adjacent_interface should include the exact neighboring subsystem label and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature so the neighbor can declare the same joint family back.

verify.value: Critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

verify.value: Boundary conditions are correctly defined for downstream CFD/FEA.
verify.rule: Boundary conditions must include fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces with physically distributed coordinates.

risk.desc: The design lacks detailed stress analysis for the tilt mechanism.
risk.mit: Conduct a finite element analysis (FEA) to evaluate stress distribution and ensure structural integrity.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment between the servo linkage and worm gear may affect precision.
risk.mit: Implement a precise alignment mechanism or adjust the manufacturing tolerance to H6/h5.

risk.desc: Cooling fins may not be sufficient to dissipate heat from the motor under high load.
risk.mit: Increase the size or number of cooling fins and conduct thermal simulations to verify performance.

risk.desc: The design does not account for environmental factors such as rain and dust ingress.
risk.mit: Include sealing mechanisms or protective covers to ensure the subsystem is weather-resistant.

risk.desc: The service access panel may be difficult to remove for maintenance.
risk.mit: Design the access panel with quick-release features or larger clearance to facilitate easy removal.
